query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `alertas` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `leadId` int NOT NULL,
  `corretorId` int NOT NULL,
  `remetenteId` int NOT NULL,
  `mensagem` text NOT NULL,
  `lido` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `lidoEm` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `alertas_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `alertas_corretor_idx` (`corretorId`),
  INDEX `alertas_lido_idx` (`lido`),
  INDEX `alertas_created_at_idx` (`createdAt`)
);
